# Vendored GSAP runtime

The Worlds atlas uses the following unmodified browser distributions from the
official `gsap` npm package:

- `gsap-3.15.0.min.js`
- `ScrollTrigger-3.15.0.min.js`

Package source: `https://registry.npmjs.org/gsap/-/gsap-3.15.0.tgz`

GSAP is distributed under GreenSock's Standard "no charge" license. Review the
current terms before reusing these files in another product:
`https://gsap.com/standard-license/`.
